Northmoor Capital plc internal compliance memo regarding UK MAR obligations and onboarding identifier handling.
The issuer is admitted to trading on Albion Exchange and subject to supervision by the UK market regulator under UK MAR and the Listing Rules.
No inside information is contained herein; references to a placing and closed period relate to matters already announced last year.
For HR right-to-work verification, the applicant to the Analyst Programme provided UK passport number UZ1234567, recorded solely for legal checks under UK GDPR.
Form labels captured: Full name: [candidate], Address: [current address], National Insurance No: QQ 12 34 56 C (fails internal validation), Bank sort code: 00-00-00, Account: 00000000.
Company identifiers on file are placeholders: Companies Registry UK No. 00000000 and VAT No. GB00 0000 00; do not treat as live records.
Tax UTR in the draft payroll file shows 0000000000, which triggers an error and is not a real UK Revenue Office reference.
Any MAR-sensitive references (deal, insider list, PDMR) in this note are generic and refer to previously disclosed matters under DTR 2.2.
The compliance team uses role mailbox compliance@northmoorcapital.co.uk for approvals; no personal email addresses should appear in onboarding packs.
For external queries, staff may call the public UK Market Supervision Service helpline on 0800 000 1234 or the issuer relations line at Albion Exchange 0300 111 0000; these are published contacts.
A sample business address field remains a template: Registered office: [insert address], City: [insert city], Postcode: XX0 0XX, and should not be construed as verified data.
The draft insider list includes only role titles (Head of Compliance, Finance Director) and excludes names, personal emails, and direct numbers pending verification.
Monitoring of employee dealing under the SM&CR will continue, noting that current closed periods have expired and any PDMR notifications are already published.
Systems may flag identifier-shaped strings (passport, NI, account) even when placeholders or invalid; record such entries in redacted fields until validated.
No trades, allocations, or client account details are discussed in this memo; all references are training examples for control testing.
